n: A Wager: Rot in the Gut

steps.t: The soldiers Gradir and Tawaris can be found on the northern side of the Second Circle. Hear what Tawaris has to say.
The soldiers Gradir and Tawaris can be found on the northern side of the Second Circle. Hear what Gradir has to say.
You should bring Gradir the items he needs to make rotgut: ale dregs from the Splintered Shield, hot brazier ash, and Healer's Caustic. All three ingr…
Gradir and Tawaris can be found on the northern side of the Second Circle. You should return to Gradir with the rotgut ingredients.
Gradir and Tawaris can be found on the northern side of the Second Circle. Hear what Tawaris has to say.
Standing after a drink of rotgut is not enough for Tawaris. He wants to see you tap the left-hand archer on the shoulder to compliment his aim, walk b…
The soldiers can be found on the northern side of the Second Circle. You should return to Gradir and Tawaris so they can settle their bet.
